{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219583031428AC67C5B40B2CC62"}"},"total":503},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7328416399170110270","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，美食题材在小说界混起来很难[赶稿中]，用文字描写出对食物的感观很难，远不如漫画动画那样直观深入人心，而像那些漫画动画中的“爆衣”等场景更是无法完美展现[思考]作者能写成这样已经非常好了[学会了]
整体线路以校园学生开始到毕业结束，篇幅掌控地正好，毕竟是美食题材不像其他都市题材能一直套娃，适可而止才能完美收官[懂了]剧情推进速度也很平稳，作为学生参加活动比赛为毕业后打下名声，与后期完美衔接[探究]在前期穿插了很多笑点，到后期明显以做菜为主有些枯燥，这也是美食题材最大的弊端，人物建设上都很饱满，感情线有但不多[思考]。主角的设定有些太过完美，人物性情素养这些太过“正能量”反而给人一种很不真实的感觉[尬笑]
总结起来，是一部节奏平缓的美食小说，结构框架完整，喜欢美食题材或没接触过得可以入手，也期望作者能够创作出更好的作品[学会了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706281580,"group_id":"7245490113512213541","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N54eSy8fxmPtCs5RMrxbZ7Tm3OBMHsFo8FVQz/gFBNY5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bf6f4fcb718843039074384757ef05c3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710359&x-signature=k84QFlvEIo80eUQRXairZ9pN2c8%3D","user_id":"1266258099310238","user_name":"修行の愚者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1266258099310238","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7245490113512213541","book_info":{"abstract":"【美食+搞笑+单女主+穿越+系统】
陆荣在大学校园里租了个小摊位卖盒饭，结果生意惨淡，濒临倒闭。
幸好在关键时候苏醒了超级美食系统，瞬间化身为顶级大厨。
单单一个蛋炒饭，就让无数师生趋之若鹜。
接着，陆荣又推出了更多的极品美味，这下全校上下都疯狂了。
纷纷加入到干饭人的大军里。
没过多久，全国各地的食客为了品尝一口美食，纷纷赶来.....","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/90c728c2d70265a758e523f0292f1de9","author":"超级小龙虾","author_id":"","book_id":"7245490113512213541","book_name":"我卖盒饭，学校食堂倒闭很正常吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2714人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7245490272757514764","read_count":"2714","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"576267"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"165","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,美食,单女主,搞笑轻松,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/faf77be7c548e11ca928bf0135571e5a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364710&x-signature=hhcSzAnoGl0Wnd8S9zKOOJf9tN4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"109823542969","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_ite
